response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a Staff/Senior Software Engineer with 15+ years of experience spanning embedded systems, high-throughput microservices, AI-agent infrastructure, and open-source platform development. While his TypeScript, React, and AWS skills technically satisfy the role's requirements, he represents a severe seniority mismatch for an entry-level individual contributor position. Hiring him into a junior/mid role would almost certainly result in rapid attrition, misaligned compensation expectations, and underutilization of his capabilities. His background has minimal PostgreSQL exposure — MongoDB and DLang databases dominate his history — and Nest.js is absent from his experience.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and React proficiency demonstrated across multiple production environments including direct mail automation and energy platform work
Hands-on AWS (CDK), Kubernetes, and LLM/AI-agent experience directly matching the role's nice-to-have qualifications
Deep commitment to software craftsmanship — TDD, clean architecture, CI/CD, trunk-based development — signals high code quality standards
concerns: Severely overqualified: 15+ years of Staff and Senior-level roles are incompatible with an entry-level individual contributor position
No explicit PostgreSQL experience; database background skews toward MongoDB and non-relational systems rather than the preferred relational stack
Compensation expectations and career trajectory almost certainly misaligned with a junior/mid-level role, creating high attrition risk
